template_data.lead_html: What actually happens after you hit submit.

rows.what_html: Legal name audit — EIN vs. IRS records, exact match required before anything moves
CAGE code history pull — prior registrations, lapsed dates, flags that stall review
Notarized letter review — the missing document that kills more registrations than any other

template_data.closer: SAM.GOV IS A CREDENTIAL. TREAT IT LIKE ONE.
template_data.image_headline: SAM.GOV IS A CREDENTIAL NOT A FORM
template_data.image_prompt: Infographic process layout. Bold top header: 'WHAT SAM.GOV ACTUALLY CHECKS' with caution icon on dark navy band. Center: illustrated professional woman at laptop reviewing a government portal screen. Left column: three numbered steps with short 2-3 word labels — 'IRS MATCH', 'CAGE PULL', 'NOTARIZED DOC' — each with colored status icon (red X or yellow clock). Right column: illustrated clipboard checklist. Bottom dark navy banner callout: 'PENDING ≠ SUBMITTED'. Footer text: 'Josh Ladick · GSA Focus'.
